industry_evidence: Name indicates financial services / advisory / lending (match: 'Fund')
compliance_rationale: Financial-services clients handle non-public personal information (NPI) and payment data. GLBA Safeguards Rule requires a written information-security program. SOC 2 Type II is increasingly the de-facto standard for vendor diligence. PCI DSS applies wherever cards are accepted (including custodial fee processing).
